verdicts.rationale: Matches analysis.findings[0] ruleId=onpage:meta-missing exactly (count=1, affectedUrls=["https://example-clean.test/leistungen"]); the finding correctly reports the raw count of 1 and explicitly declines to state the 33.3% pctOfPages as a site-wide quota given minNMet=false, so gemessen is justified and no number is invented.

Matches analysis.findings[1] ruleId=geo:no-faq-howto (count=1, affectedUrls=[], pctOfPages=null, severity="info"); the finding correctly treats this as a site-wide sentinel with no per-page share, discloses the info→niedrig severity mapping in beleg, and states no numeric claim beyond count=1, so gemessen and pass are justified.
